case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY CO & BILL HALL BAIL BONDS

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY CO & BILL HALL BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY CO & BILL HALL BAIL BONDS $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,080.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
CASH SUBSTITUTION OF SURETY BONDS. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
